nasb.text: who had been taken into exile from Jerusalem with the captives who had been exiled with Jeconiah king of Judah, whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had exiled.

esv.text: who had been carried away from Jerusalem among the captives carried away with Jeconiah king of Judah, whom Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon had carried away.

cnv.text: 末底改在巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒擄走猶大王耶哥尼雅和別的俘虜的時候，也同時從耶路撒冷被擄走。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒曾从耶路撒冷掳走犹大王耶哥尼雅和百姓，末底改也在其中。
